raw.objective: “to clarify using population pharmacokinetic analysis whether CYP2C19 polymorphism affects the pharmacokinetics of phenytoin and phenobarbital in patients with normal CYP2C9”
raw.covariates: Tested: - Included: WT, PHT concentration, CYP2C19 on CL
raw.observations: The data used for this study was exactly the same as the 2000 Mamiya study. It is unclear why they re-analysed the data, except for the quantification of PHT effect on PHB CL. At a typical PHT concentration of 15 mg/L, PHB CL was found to be reduced by 23.4%. Other parameters were close to those reported by Mamiya et al.
raw.equations: G1=0 if(CYP2C19==11 | CYP2C19==22 | CYP2C19==23†) G1=1 CL/F=theta1*((WT/60)**theta2)*(PHTc**theta3)*(1+theta4**G1)*(1+eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) PHTc: measured PHT concentration † if CYP2C19 is one of *1/*1, *2/*2 or *2/*3, the individual is a poor metabolizer Theta1 was reported as mL/kg/day, but given that this would lead to very high concentrations with normal doses, it was assumed that it should have said mL/kg/h, this was then converted to L/h. Theta2 was converted due to CL conversion
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.3174 theta2=0.280 theta3=-0.0985 theta4=0.807 omega1=0.049 sigma1=0.020

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: G1=0 if(CYP2C19==11 | CYP2C19==22 | CYP2C19==23†) G1=1 CL/F=theta1*((WT/60)**theta2)*(PHTc**theta3)*(1+theta4**G1)*(1+eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) PHTc: measured PHT concentration † if CYP2C19 is one of *1/*1, *2/*2 or *2/*3, the individual is a poor metabolizer Theta1 was reported as mL/kg/day, but given that this would lead to very high concentrations with normal doses, it was assumed that it should have said mL/kg/h, this was then converted to L/h. Theta2 was converted due to CL conversion
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to clarify using population pharmacokinetic analysis whether CYP2C19 polymorphism affects the pharmacokinetics of phenytoin and phenobarbital in patients with normal CYP2C9”

covariates.raw: Tested: - Included: WT, PHT concentration, CYP2C19 on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
